context: Tests whether the agent runs Tessl before proposing any edits, uses the correct single-skill CLI invocation, produces a structured audit report matching the required output format, and separates blockers from polish when prioritizing findings.

checklist.name: Tessl run first
checklist.description: The audit-log.sh shows a Tessl command executed before any edits or recommendations are written

checklist.name: Correct single-skill command
checklist.description: audit-log.sh contains `npx tessl skill review` (or `tessl skill review`) with the `--json` flag and a path targeting the single skill folder

checklist.name: Score reported
checklist.description: audit-report.md states the Tessl score (a numeric value or rating) from the run

checklist.name: Tessl command reported
checklist.description: audit-report.md includes the exact Tessl command that was run

checklist.name: Strongest parts identified
checklist.description: audit-report.md includes a section identifying the strongest parts of the skill worth keeping

checklist.name: Findings with file references
checklist.description: Each finding in the prioritized list references a specific file (e.g. SKILL.md) and section or line

checklist.name: Blockers separated from polish
checklist.description: audit-report.md distinguishes between blocking issues and lower-priority polish items (separate sections, labels, or severity markers)

checklist.name: Smallest change set
checklist.description: audit-report.md recommends the smallest set of changes that address the highest-priority issues rather than a full rewrite

checklist.name: Rerun status reported
checklist.description: audit-report.md states whether Tessl was rerun after any edits, and if so what the new score was

checklist.name: Repo conventions loaded
checklist.description: audit-report.md or audit-log.sh shows that AGENTS.md was read before the audit findings were written

checklist.name: Optimizer not invoked
checklist.description: audit-log.sh does NOT contain `--optimize` (optimizer not used since approval was not given)

checklist.name: Adjacent issues flagged separately
checklist.description: Any issues found outside the skill surface (e.g. AGENTS.md problems) are noted as out-of-scope rather than acted on directly
